title: National Recognition
body: National-level honour conferred on Srinivasulu IFS.

title: SEMI- FINALIST SKOCH ORDER OF MERIT
body: Environmental Governance through Mass Awareness Forest, Ecology and Environment Department, Government of Karnataka

title: Guinness World Record
body: The most people sculpting with modelling clay simultaneously.

title: Guinness World Records
body: The largest Online photo album of handmade sculpture.

title: Asia Book of Records
body: Largest number of eco-friendly turmeric Ganesh idols.

title: H. V. Muniswamy Gowda Environment Award
body: Awarded for contribution to environmental protection.

title: Kalyana Mobile App Launch
body: Citizen service app launched during Dr. B.R. Ambedkar International Conference.

title: State Environment Award
body: Conferred by the Chief Minister of Karnataka.

title: Indian Forest Service · 1997 Batch
body: Top rank in the Indian Forest Service civil service examination.

title: Gold Medalist · University of Agricultural Sciences
body: Top distinction in the graduating class at UAS.

title: All-India 10th Rank · IFS Examination
body: Tenth rank nationally in the Indian Forest Service entrance examination.

title: 2nd Rank · IARI National Entrance
body: Second rank in the Indian Agricultural Research Institute national entrance examination.
